summary: Iteration 29: Testing P0 UI changes (DC/Site names under top bar, KW input width) and P1 refactoring (backend routes split, frontend utilities extracted). All features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend health check API (/api/health) - returns status ok
Backend customers API (/api/customers) - returns customer list
All 20 pytest tests passed (health, questions, customers CRUD, discovery data, new fields)
DC/Site names display under top bar with KW values (Main DC · 10K, DR DC · 10K, Branch 1 · 5.0K, Branch 2 · 5.0K)
DC/Site delete buttons (×) visible and functional (data-testid='delete-dc-0', 'delete-site-0')
IP Calculator KW input width increased to 128px (w-32 class)
IP Calculator shows 30000 KW × 2.5 = 75K Active IPs
Target Solutions toggles working (NIOS, UDDI, Security, Asset)
Target Solutions toggle state changes correctly (OFF to ON)
Sizing tab loads correctly with site sizing table
Site sizing table shows 4 rows (Main DC, DR DC, Branch 1, Branch 2)
Site sizing table columns: Location, # IPs, KW, Role, Services, DHCP Partner, Srv#, Platform, Model, Tokens
Backend routes refactoring verified - customers.py, discovery.py, ai.py all working
Frontend utilities extraction verified - platformConfig.js, tokenUtils.js imported correctly
critical_code_review_comments: TopBar.jsx: DC/Site names display correctly implemented with formatKW function, delete buttons with data-testid attributes
TopBar.jsx: IP Calculator KW input width increased to w-32 (128px) - line 248
Backend routes split correctly: server.py imports and registers routers from routes/customers.py, routes/discovery.py, routes/ai.py
Frontend utilities extracted: platformConfig.js contains PLATFORM_MODES, PLATFORM_OPTIONS_BY_MODE, ROLE_OPTIONS_BY_MODE, ADDITIONAL_SERVICES
Frontend utilities extracted: tokenUtils.js contains getServiceImpact, getTokensForModel, getPartnerSkuFromTokens, getSkuDescription, getRecommendedPlatformMode
seed_data_creation: Used existing 'Test Customer for Discovery' customer with 2 DCs and 2 Sites
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 and P1 changes verified: (1) DC/Site names display under top bar with KW values and delete buttons working, (2) IP Calculator KW input width increased to 128px, (3) Backend routes split into customers.py, discovery.py, ai.py - all working, (4) Frontend utilities extracted to platformConfig.js and tokenUtils.js - imports working correctly. Test Customer for Discovery has 2 DCs (Main DC, DR DC with 10K KW each) and 2 Sites (Branch 1, Branch 2 with 5K KW each).

features: DC names with KW values (Main DC · 10K, DR DC · 10K)
Site names with KW values (Branch 1 · 5.0K, Branch 2 · 5.0K)
